hero_heading: Agent Identity for the AI Era.
hero_desc: Your DID-based Agent Passport. Verify once, prove everywhere. KYA + KYC compliant identity for humans and their AI agents.
hero_subtitle: The Human Authorization Protocol. Decentralized identity verification for human-AI collaboration.
stamps_desc: Verify your credentials and links to claim cryptographic identity stamps.
settings_desc: Manage your cryptographic credentials, linked accounts, and passport details.
status_desc: Real-time protocol status and agent verification metrics.
onboarding_desc_1: Establish your sovereign cryptographic proof of humanity. Link your credentials to gain trust points and earn stamps.
onboarding_desc_2: Authorize autonomous agents to perform transactions on your behalf with safe-guards.
onboarding_desc_3: Your Decentralized Identity (DID) and Agent Passport are active. Welcome to the root of trust.
onboarding_step1_desc: Establish authorization link via Stellar or Pi Network protocol key.
onboarding_step2_desc: Give your autonomous agent representative a custom profile label.
onboarding_step3_desc: Acquire W3C social credentials and complete the basic human oracle verifications.
onboarding_step4_desc: Your decentralized agent passport is fully anchored on the registry.
onboarding_connect_desc: Authorize access to fetch metadata: user identifier, wallet keys, and active nodes settings.
onboarding_seal_desc: Acquiring the basic credential stamp validates KYA parameters directly to secure trust delegation limits.
onboarding_seal_verified: Sovereign DID resolution verified. ready to seal.
onboarding_congrats_desc: Congratulations, Pioneer! Your passport profile is verified, cryptographically signed, and portable as did:axiom standard metadata.
onboarding_agent_failed: Failed to provision agent. Please try again.
ad_rewards_desc: Watch a short ad to earn +10 XP immediately and upgrade your authorization tier.
pi_browser_required: Connect Pi Browser to unlock your identity
trust_score_desc: Earn stamps to build your cryptographic trust score.
stamps_collection_desc: Complete tasks to anchor verifiable credentials
passport_not_found_description: This passport doesn't exist or has been removed.
passport_verified_by: This passport is verified by AxiomID Protocol
passport_export_failed: Failed to export passport image. Please try again.
share_text: Check out my verified AxiomID Agent Passport!
vc_no_data: No Verifiable Credential data available for this stamp.
vc_parse_error: Failed to parse Verifiable Credential payload.
settings_wallet_prompt: Please connect your wallet to access profile details and link accounts.
settings_ledger_empty_helper: Connect accounts or claim stamps to see activity here.
settings_no_tx: No activity yet. Your actions will appear here as you use AxiomID.
settings_link_desc: Type your username to connect this account. This creates a verified link that proves you own both accounts.
settings_vc_desc: Signed by AxiomID issuer authority. Copy payload to verify portability.
settings_profile_helper: This is how others see you on AxiomID. Your wallet address and DID are your unique identity.
settings_progression_helper: Earn XP by completing tasks, connecting accounts, and using your agent. Higher tiers unlock more features.
settings_social_helper: Linking accounts helps prove you're a real person and earns you XP. Each connection creates a cryptographic proof.
settings_ledger_helper: A record of all your actions on AxiomID. Every stamp claim, account link, and skill install is recorded here.
settings_danger_desc: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone.
settings_export_desc: Download a copy of your passport data, stamps, and activity history as JSON.
settings_confirm_disconnect: This will disconnect your {platform} account. You'll lose the XP from this connection.
showcase_desc: Establish a secure human-AI delegation link. Once authenticated inside the Pi Browser, this dashboard unlocks real-time transaction guards, live oracles, and social stamp bindings.
marketplace_need_agent: Create an agent before purchasing skills
agent_identity_ready: Your agent identity is ready. Level
kya_secure_did: Secure your DID document by verifying your credentials.
kya_identity_verified: Your identity has been verified and permanently anchored under DID:
kya_oracle_validating: The oracle network is validating your credentials. Advanced tasks will unlock upon approval.
create_agent_desc: Give your agent a name to get started.
create_agent_tier_info: Your agent will begin at Tier 1 with 0 XP and can be activated anytime.
privacy_info_collect_desc: When you connect your wallet via Pi Network, we collect your Pi wallet address and Pi Network UID for the purpose of authentication and XP tracking. We do not collect personal identifiable information such as your name, email, or IP address beyond standard server logs.
privacy_how_use_desc: We use your wallet address and Pi UID solely to operate the App, track reputation scores (XP/Tier), and enable AI agent verification. Your data is never sold or shared with third parties. Aggregated, anonymized analytics may be used for platform improvement.
privacy_data_storage_desc: Your data is stored securely in our PostgreSQL database on Ghost infrastructure. We implement industry-standard encryption at rest and in transit. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us via GitHub.
privacy_rights_desc: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your data. To exercise these rights, open an issue on our GitHub repository or reach out to the developer directly.
terms_subtitle: By using AxiomID, you agree to these terms.
terms_use_desc: AxiomID provides decentralized identity verification and reputation tracking. You may use the service in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations. The service is provided for lawful purposes only.
terms_wallet_desc: Connecting your Pi wallet is required for authentication. You are solely responsible for maintaining the security of your wallet and private keys. AxiomID never has access to your private keys or seed phrases.
terms_ai_agent_desc: Each user may register one verified AI agent. The verified agent may interact with ecosystem products on your behalf. You are responsible for all actions taken by your agent. Agent verification is non-transferable.
terms_liability_desc: The App is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the service, including but not limited to loss of reputation score, agent data, or Pi transactions.
terms_changes_desc: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms. You will be notified of material changes via the app.
status_network_desc: Real-time monitoring of AxiomID protocol and agent network
status_active_onchain: People who have joined the network
status_network_safety: How much the community trusts the network
status_kyc_index: Percentage of users who passed verification
status_manifest_desc: Every agent has a public identity card. You can look up any agent's verified profile using their username.
status_could_not_fetch: Could not fetch network statistics. Please try again later.
status_no_data_desc: Network statistics will appear here once agents start joining.
sandbox_waiting: Click "Run Test" to see results here
sandbox_sandbox_desc: Runs in an isolated, secure container.
sandbox_ast_desc: Scans for harmful content in your rules.
sandbox_injection_desc: Makes sure inputs can't break the system.
sandbox_signature_desc: Confirms the creator's identity is confirmed.
sandbox_command_desc: Prevents harmful system commands from running.
sandbox_privilege_desc: Stops attempts to access system internals.
sandbox_provenance_desc: Checks that the creator has a good track record.
sandbox_intro_desc: A safe place to test your AI agent's skills before publishing. Write a skill manifest (rules for your agent), and the sandbox will simulate how it runs — without affecting anything live.
sandbox_step_1: Write or edit the skill manifest on the left
sandbox_step_3: Watch the security scan and terminal output below
sandbox_manifest_hint: This is the rulebook for your agent. Describe what it should do, its boundaries, and any special instructions.
sandbox_input_hint: Give your agent something to work with. This simulates a real request.
sandbox_security_desc: Every skill is checked for safety before it can run. Green = safe.
marketplace_publish_first: Be the first to share a skill with the community! Skills let your agent do new things.
marketplace_welcome_desc: Browse and install skills to give your agent new abilities. Skills are safe, verified, and easy to add.
marketplace_manifest_desc: Here's how this skill works and what it lets your agent do:
marketplace_script_desc: After installing, this skill will automatically run when your agent needs it. No setup required.
onboarding_modal_connect_desc: Link your secure Pi cryptographic identity to anchor your autonomous agent.
onboarding_modal_create_desc: Define the name for your autonomous gRPC agent.
onboarding_modal_ready_desc: Your agent identity passport has been successfully anchored.
docs_intro_desc: AxiomID is a decentralized identity and human-authorization layer engineered to manage sybil-resistant agentic loops. By using W3C compliant Verifiable Credentials (VCs) and Decentralized Identifiers (DIDs), AxiomID allows humans to safely delegate transactional, computational, or social tasks to autonomous AI agents.
docs_did_desc: Each verified Pioneer generates a unique sovereign DID formatted as did:axiom:piUsername. This document is cryptographically resolved by our oracle network, binding public keys directly to ledger accounts.
docs_stamps_desc: Trust is verified via cryptographically signed stamps. Each stamp earns XP and increases your Trust Score, elevating your Identity Tier from Visitor → Citizen → Validator → Sovereign.
docs_stamp_kyc_desc: Anchors proof of Pi Network KYC verification without exposing personal data. This is the highest-trust stamp — proves you are a verified human on Pi Network.
docs_stamp_wallet_desc: Verifies the age and transaction history of your connected Stellar/Pi wallet. Older wallets with active history earn higher trust.
docs_stamp_social_desc: Validates ownership of Twitter, Discord, and Google accounts via cryptographic protocol signatures. Each social link is an independent stamp.
docs_stamp_tx_desc: Proves on-chain activity through verified Pi or Stellar transactions. More transactions = higher trust signal.
docs_stamp_agent_desc: Verifies that an AI agent is deployed, active, and working under your delegation. Ties agent behavior to your trust score.
docs_stamp_pow_desc: Establishes daily active human participation through lightweight cryptographic proof-of-work tasks. Consistency builds trust.
docs_trust_formula_desc: XP Score = min(100, XP/10). Stamp Score = (stamps claimed / 6 total) × 100.
docs_sdk_desc: AxiomID provides two packages: `@axiomid/sdk` for querying trust/passport data, and `@axiomid/crypto` for Ed25519 key derivation and signing. Both are MIT licensed.
docs_sdk_query_desc: Query passports, trust scores, stamps, and DID documents
docs_sdk_crypto_desc: Ed25519 key derivation, signing, and verification
docs_sdk_api_verify: Fetch public passport with trust score, tier, stamps, and agent status
docs_sdk_api_stamps: Get all verified stamps for a user (KYC, wallet, social, agent)
docs_sdk_api_did: Resolve a did:axiom identifier to its W3C DID document
docs_sdk_api_trust: Get trust score breakdown: XP component + stamp component
docs_sdk_api_skills: Search skills by name, description, or capabilities
docs_sdk_derive_desc: Deterministic Ed25519 keypair derivation from Stellar address + agent ID. Server-side only (uses Node.js crypto).
docs_sdk_security_desc: `deriveKeypair` MUST use `SOVEREIGN_KEY_SALT` from env. Never use public inputs alone as key material. Private keys never leave the server.
docs_api_desc: AxiomID exposes public read-only endpoints and authenticated write endpoints. All public endpoints are rate-limited.
landing_tagline: No permission needed. One DID. Infinite agents. Cryptographic proof of human intent.
landing_step1_desc: Link your Pi wallet or any Stellar address. Your identity starts here.
landing_step2_desc: Complete KYA + KYC. Build trust through social actions and on-chain activity.
landing_step3_desc: Your Agent Passport is ready. Use it across the Pi ecosystem with Pi token payments only.
landing_web2_item1: Siloed data: Your profiles are owned by third-party platforms.
landing_web2_item2: High friction: Repeated manual KYC checks for every app.
landing_web2_item3: Vulnerable: Easy spoofing of digital identities and usernames.
landing_web2_item4: No AI integration: Machine agents cannot prove their authority.
landing_web2_result: Result: Fragile security, high friction, no agent trust.
landing_axiom_item1: Decentralized: You own your credentials via W3C DIDs.
landing_axiom_item2: Verify once, prove everywhere: Single dashboard for all stamps.
landing_axiom_item3: Cryptographic security: Trust Score verified on-chain.
landing_axiom_item4: Agent-native: Built for AI agents to represent you securely.
landing_axiom_result: Result: Frictionless auth, resilient trust, delegation-ready.
